mapper.select: select date_format(record_time, '%Y-%m') as month, coalesce(sum(case when type = 1 then amount else 0 end), 0) as income, coalesce(sum(case when type = 2 then amount else 0 end), 0) as expense from bill where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 and record_time >= #{startTime} and record_time < #{endTime} group by date_format(record_time, '%Y-%m') order by month asc
